item.title: 【週間天気】この先1週間の天気のポイント ・西日本〜東日本は晴れ間が増える ・猛暑日予想も 熱中症対策に注意を ・台風9…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【週間天気】この先1週間の天気のポイント
・西日本〜東日本は晴れ間が増える
・猛暑日予想も　熱中症対策に注意を
・台風9号　週末の沖縄に影響の可能性
▼詳しくはこちら▼
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【週間天気】この先1週間の天気のポイント
・西日本〜東日本は晴れ間が増える
・猛暑日予想も　熱中症対策に注意を
・台風9号　週末の沖縄に影響の可能性
▼詳しくはこちら▼

item.title: 蒲田いるよ〜❣️ ～16:30🈵♡ 16:45-🈳です🧸 久しぶりに来てくれる人も多くて嬉しい気持ちだよ〜忘れ…
item.author: ゆめの (@yumecharhea.bsky.social)
item.description:
蒲田いるよ〜❣️

～16:30🈵♡
16:45-🈳です🧸

久しぶりに来てくれる人も多くて嬉しい気持ちだよ〜忘れないでくれてありがとう❕
今日も沢山癒させてね♡
23:00までのんびり待ってます🎀

お問い合わせご予約こちらまで🤍
080-9197-9966

item.title: President Trump addressed the nation on its 250th anniversar…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Trump addressed the nation on its 250th anniversary to a scattered crowd in Washington late on Saturday, following a stormy forecast that led officials to evacuate the National Mall for more than two hours.
item.content:encoded: President Trump addressed the nation on its 250th anniversary to a scattered crowd in Washington late on Saturday, following a stormy forecast that led officials to evacuate the National Mall for more than two hours.

item.title: にゃんぱすー🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧…

item.title: 作品名 【 Pure ～ピュア～ 】 ゆびわ言葉 ： 純愛 miyabi.mu/ring/ring_00... ゆびわ…
item.author: 雅-miyabi-【公式】婚約指輪・結婚指輪専門店 (@miyabibridal.bsky.social)
item.description:
作品名 【 Pure ～ピュア～ 】
ゆびわ言葉 ： 純愛
miyabi.mu/ring/ring_00...

ゆびわ言葉には
『純粋な気持ちをリングに込めて、いつまでも変わらない
愛へと成長させていけますように。』
という想いが込められています♡
.
純粋な心をイメージしデザインされました。
婚約指輪(エンゲージリング)はセンターダイヤのみの
シンプルで王道なデザインです。
.
結婚指輪(マリッジリング)のレディースは
センターにピンクダイヤを1石セッティング。
レディース、メンズ共に細身で普段使いしやすい
結婚指輪です

雅-miyabi-は京都府唯一のAFFLUX正規取り扱い店です💁🏻‍♀️
item.content:encoded:
作品名 【 Pure ～ピュア～ 】
ゆびわ言葉 ： 純愛
miyabi.mu/ring/ring_00...

ゆびわ言葉には
『純粋な気持ちをリングに込めて、いつまでも変わらない
愛へと成長させていけますように。』
という想いが込められています♡
.
純粋な心をイメージしデザインされました。
婚約指輪(エンゲージリング)はセンターダイヤのみの
シンプルで王道なデザインです。
.
結婚指輪(マリッジリング)のレディースは
センターにピンクダイヤを1石セッティング。
レディース、メンズ共に細身で普段使いしやすい
結婚指輪です

雅-miyabi-は京都府唯一のAFFLUX正規取り扱い店です💁🏻‍♀️

item.author: 47NEWS (@47news.jp)

item.title: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な…
item.author: ぬまがさワタリ@『いきものニュース図解』ほか3/19同時発売 (@numagasa.bsky.social)
item.description: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう
item.content:encoded: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう

item.title: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。こ…
item.author: 田中貴子 (@takakotanaka.bsky.social)
item.description: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。
item.content:encoded: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。

item.title: トランプ米大統領「ここは自由の国だ」 独立宣言から250年の歩み 分岐点

item.title: My baby boy, Finnegan, is extremely sick. He isn’t going to …
item.author: Sarah Aces 💜♠️ | Goth Fox VTuber | FFXI Simp (@sarahaces.bsky.social)
item.description:
My baby boy, Finnegan, is extremely sick. He isn’t going to make it. I’m with the vet discussing the best course. And… he will be going to sleep.

I know you all loved and adored Fin. He will forever be the best baby boy ever. There will never be another cat like him.

I love you Fin, I will forever
item.content:encoded:
My baby boy, Finnegan, is extremely sick. He isn’t going to make it. I’m with the vet discussing the best course. And… he will be going to sleep.

I know you all loved and adored Fin. He will forever be the best baby boy ever. There will never be another cat like him.

I love you Fin, I will forever

item.title: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!
item.content:encoded: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!

item.title: 毎日帰宅時におけるちくわ歓迎の儀

item.content:encoded: 毎日帰宅時におけるちくわ歓迎の儀

item.title: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! T…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!

item.title: 2050年の渋谷を舞台にした近未来SFアニメ『レベルロボチカ』ティザーPV公開、総監督：大沼心＆シリーズ構成：吉上亮＆テ…
item.author: GIGAZINE (@gigazine.net)
item.description:
2050年の渋谷を舞台にした近未来SFアニメ『レベルロボチカ』ティザーPV公開、総監督：大沼心＆シリーズ構成：吉上亮＆テーマ・挿入歌：梶浦由記らメインスタッフ情報も解禁
https://gigazine.net/news/20260705-rebel-robotica/
item.content:encoded:
2050年の渋谷を舞台にした近未来SFアニメ『レベルロボチカ』ティザーPV公開、総監督：大沼心＆シリーズ構成：吉上亮＆テーマ・挿入歌：梶浦由記らメインスタッフ情報も解禁
https://gigazine.net/news/20260705-rebel-robotica/

item.title: #🔖おもしろ 俺のチンコが進化したので、機能を紹介するぜ！ ・収納ケースがついている ・デオドラント効果がある ・W…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖おもしろ
俺のチンコが進化したので、機能を紹介するぜ！

・収納ケースがついている ・デオドラント効果がある ・Wi-Fiが飛んでる ・時々「PayPay！」と声がする ・そのおかげで熊が寄ってこない ・少量のナフサが出る ・トイレまで伸びてくれる（最長50m） ・玉を狙われたら犠牲になって守ってくれる ・筆記用具になる ・ライト機能がある ・射精ストップボタン完備 ・顔がある...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖おもしろ
俺のチンコが進化したので、機能を紹介するぜ！

・収納ケースがついている ・デオドラント効果がある ・Wi-Fiが飛んでる ・時々「PayPay！」と声がする ・そのおかげで熊が寄ってこない ・少量のナフサが出る ・トイレまで伸びてくれる（最長50m） ・玉を狙われたら犠牲になって守ってくれる ・筆記用具になる ・ライト機能がある ・射精ストップボタン完備 ・顔がある...

item.title: Our remaining forests in the Amazon and the Congo Basin are …
item.author: Abilu Tangwa. (@abilutangwa.bsky.social)
item.description: Our remaining forests in the Amazon and the Congo Basin are the ultimate defense line against climate change. Allowing their destruction isn't just local negligence,it’s global ecocide. We must demand environmental sustainability now.
item.content:encoded: Our remaining forests in the Amazon and the Congo Basin are the ultimate defense line against climate change. Allowing their destruction isn't just local negligence,it’s global ecocide. We must demand environmental sustainability now.

item.title: não consigo aceitar que a rússia foi proibida de jogar pela …

item.description:
não consigo aceitar que a rússia foi proibida de jogar pela FIFA

mas os estragos fodidos não
item.content:encoded:

item.title: For more than a decade, the all-white judges of a Louisiana …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
For more than a decade, the all-white judges of a Louisiana appellate court ignored thousands of petitions filed by prisoners, most of them Black, who claimed they had been wrongly convicted.

Efforts to expose the injustice went unheard.

(Published Nov. 2023)
item.content:encoded:
For more than a decade, the all-white judges of a Louisiana appellate court ignored thousands of petitions filed by prisoners, most of them Black, who claimed they had been wrongly convicted.

Efforts to expose the injustice went unheard.

(Published Nov. 2023)

item.title: Zohran Mamdani has been getting allergy shots, so that he an…
item.author: Greg Morosoff (@gregmorosoff.bsky.social)
item.description:
Zohran Mamdani has been getting allergy shots, so that he and his wife, Rama Duwaji, can adopt a cat.

Photo is from a cat adoption event alongside Long Island City Feral Feeders
From Dec. 2024

#MenWithCats
item.content:encoded:
Zohran Mamdani has been getting allergy shots, so that he and his wife, Rama Duwaji, can adopt a cat.

Photo is from a cat adoption event alongside Long Island City Feral Feeders
From Dec. 2024

#MenWithCats

item.title: Some things do not need to be loud to be powerful. Some thin…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Some things do not need to be loud to be powerful. Some things do not need sunlight to bloom. Let this be your quiet reminder: You can grow even in the dark. Quiet things are wild and wise—like blooming beneath a shadowed sky.
item.content:encoded: Some things do not need to be loud to be powerful. Some things do not need sunlight to bloom. Let this be your quiet reminder: You can grow even in the dark. Quiet things are wild and wise—like blooming beneath a shadowed sky.

item.description: Favorite photo from this morning’s tall ships parade
item.content:encoded: Favorite photo from this morning’s tall ships parade

item.title: With unexpected programming and a community ethos, independe…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: With unexpected programming and a community ethos, independent cinemas across the US are giving multiplexes a run for their money
item.content:encoded: With unexpected programming and a community ethos, independent cinemas across the US are giving multiplexes a run for their money

item.title: Thank you Canada 🙏 Every team but one eventually goes home…
item.author: Chris Taylor (@christaylornyc.bsky.social)
item.description:
Thank you Canada 🙏

Every team but one eventually goes home, and it was our time today

But we went further than we ever have and you did us proud
item.content:encoded:
Thank you Canada 🙏

Every team but one eventually goes home, and it was our time today

But we went further than we ever have and you did us proud

item.title: Happy Fourth of July from the Oregon coast. My family’s bee…
item.author: Andy (@andyoregon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy Fourth of July from the Oregon coast.
My family’s been going to Oceanside, Oregon over the fourth for the last 50 years.
I love it here
item.content:encoded:
Happy Fourth of July from the Oregon coast.
My family’s been going to Oceanside, Oregon over the fourth for the last 50 years.
I love it here

item.title: Andy on the big stage. Congratulations Andy on your first A…
item.author: Los Angeles Dodgers (@dodgersbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Andy on the big stage.

Congratulations Andy on your first All-Star Game selection and being named a 2026 NL starting outfielder!
item.content:encoded:
Andy on the big stage.

Congratulations Andy on your first All-Star Game selection and being named a 2026 NL starting outfielder!

item.title: 😢 and it starts… This basket was his home when I rescued hi…
item.author: Deb (@debfly.bsky.social)
item.description: 😢 and it starts… This basket was his home when I rescued him -he was five weeks old, no teeth, still on a bottle had to convince him he was a carnivore… This is where he goes when the world explodes😢
item.content:encoded: 😢 and it starts… This basket was his home when I rescued him -he was five weeks old, no teeth, still on a bottle had to convince him he was a carnivore… This is where he goes when the world explodes😢
